# Code of Conduct

We are committed to a welcoming, harassment-free project for everyone,
regardless of background, identity, experience, or viewpoint.

Be respectful, assume good intent while evaluating technical claims on their
evidence, accept constructive feedback, and prioritize the safety of the
community. Harassment, threats, discrimination, sexualized conduct, doxxing,
and sustained disruption are not acceptable.

Report conduct concerns privately through the repository owner's GitHub
profile. Maintainers may edit or remove contributions, restrict participation,
or ban contributors when necessary. Reports will be handled as confidentially
as reasonably possible.
